channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KVSCASTING] KVS Castings Board Recommends Jaswinder Singh's Re-appointment
item.description:
KVS Castings Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 15, 2026, considered and recommended the re-appointment of Mr. Jaswinder Singh Ahluwalia (DIN: 03311764) as an Independent Director for a second term of five consecutive years. This re-appointment, in the category of Non-Executive Director, is subject to approval by the company's members through a Special Resolution via Postal Ballot and e-voting. The Board also approved the Postal Ballot Notice and authorized the Company Secretary to conduct the process, appointing M/s. Nishi & Associates as the Scrutinizer. Additionally, the Board granted omnibus approval for Related Party Transactions for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, as previously approved by the Audit Committee.

  • Board recommended re-appointment of Mr. Jaswinder Singh Ahluwalia.
  • He is proposed for a second 5-year term as Independent Director.
  • Re-appointment requires member approval via Postal Ballot.
  • Board approved omnibus Related Party Transactions for Q1 FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KVS Castings Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INFLAME] Inflame Appliances: Ashwani Goel Resigns, Amit Kaushik Appointed Director
item.description:
Inflame Appliances Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Ashwani Kumar Goel from the position of Whole-time Director, effective April 15, 2026, citing personal reasons. Concurrently, the Board of Directors approved the appointment of Mr. Amit Kaushik as an Additional Director, effective the same date, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Kaushik, who currently serves as the company's Chief Executive Officer (CEO), will also hold the title of Additional Director. He brings over 29 years of experience in business promotion and strategic leadership. Notably, Mr. Amit Kaushik is the brother of Mr. Aditya Kaushik, the Chairman and Managing Director, and the father of Mr. Anusheel Kaushik, another Whole-time Director of the company.

  • Whole-time Director Ashwani Kumar Goel resigned effective April 15, 2026.
  • Amit Kaushik appointed as Additional Director, pending shareholder approval.
  • Kaushik, current CEO, brings 29+ years of strategic leadership experience.
  • He is related to the Chairman & MD and another Whole-time Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Inflame Appliances Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ZODIAC] Zodiac Energy appoints NeoAtlas Capital as Investor Relations Advisor
item.description:
Zodiac Energy Ltd has appointed NeoAtlas Capital Advisory LLP, operating as Atlas Capital, as its Investor Relations and Strategic Advisor, effective April 15, 2026. This engagement aims to bolster the company's investor outreach and capital markets communication initiatives. NeoAtlas Capital will focus on strengthening engagement with the investor community, enhancing transparency, and aligning communication with the evolving expectations of institutional investors. This move reflects Zodiac Energy's ongoing commitment to improving its investor engagement framework.

  • Zodiac Energy appointed NeoAtlas Capital Advisory LLP as Investor Relations Advisor.
  • The appointment is effective from April 15, 2026.
  • NeoAtlas will enhance investor outreach and capital markets communication.
  • The goal is to strengthen investor engagement and transparency.
  • This aligns with evolving institutional investor expectations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zodiac Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MARCLOIRE] Marc Loire Fashions Reports NIL Investor Grievances for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Marc Loire Fashions Limited has informed the Exchange about its investor grievances redressal status for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with Regulation 13(3) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirement) Regulations, 2015. The company reported zero investor queries or complaints pending at the beginning of the quarter, received during the quarter, disposed of during the quarter, or remaining unresolved at the end of the quarter. This statement includes complaints handled by the RTA and those received through regulatory authorities like BSE, NSE, ROC, SEBI (SCORES), MSEIL, NSDL, and CDSL.

  • Marc Loire Fashions reported zero investor complaints for Q4 FY26.
  • No investor queries were pending at the start or end of the quarter.
  • No new complaints were received or disposed of during the quarter.
  • The report complies with SEBI Regulation 13(3) on investor grievances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Marc Loire Fashions Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [TULSI] Tulsi Extrusions Board Approves Q2 FY26 Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
Tulsi Extrusions Ltd's Board of Directors approved the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025, at a meeting held on April 15, 2026. The company provided a detailed clarification for the delay in submission, attributing it to regulatory and procedural constraints stemming from its prior Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process and liquidation proceedings from December 2018 to December 2021. The company's status was restored to "Active" by an NCLT order in May 2023, and the new management assumed control. Delays are also due to pending NCLT approval for fresh equity shares and extinguishment of existing capital, which impacts finalising the revised capital structure and public shareholding. The company is also reconstructing financial records post-revival. The management asserts the delay was not intentional and is committed to compliance.

  • Board approved unaudited standalone financial results for Q2 FY26 (ended Sep 30, 2025).
  • Delay in results submission attributed to past insolvency and liquidation proceedings.
  • Company revived from liquidation in May 2023 via NCLT order.
  • Finalizing capital structure and shareholding is pending NCLT approval.
  • New management is diligently working to regularize compliances and reconstruct records.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tulsi Extrusions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KOURA] Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry shifts registered office within Ahmedabad
item.description:
Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd has announced the shifting of its registered office within the local limits of Ahmedabad, effective immediately. The Board of Directors approved this change at a meeting held on April 15, 2026. The move from G/F-02, Sigma Icon-2 to 304, Iscon Emporio, both in Satellite, Ahmedabad, is intended to enhance operational convenience and efficiency, allowing the company to conduct business more economically.

  • Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry shifts registered office.
  • New office located within Ahmedabad's local limits.
  • Move aims for improved operational efficiency and economy.
  • Board approved the change on April 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Koura Fine Diamond Jewelry Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [APOLLOTYRE] Apollo Tyres: No physical share transfer re-lodgment requests processed
item.description:
Apollo Tyres Ltd submitted a report from its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies Limited, on the status of re-lodgment of physical share transfer requests as of March 31, 2026. This report was filed in compliance with SEBI Circulars dated July 2, 2025, and January 30, 2026, which provide a special window for transfer and dematerialisation of physical securities until February 4, 2027. The report confirms that as of March 31, 2026, there were NIL requests received, processed, approved, or rejected for the re-lodgment of physical share transfers during the month.

  • Apollo Tyres filed a report on physical share transfer re-lodgment requests.
  • Report covers status as of March 31, 2026, per SEBI circulars.
  • NIL requests received or processed for physical share transfers during the month.
  • Special window for dematerialisation extends to February 4, 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APOLLO TYRES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PURPLEFIN] Purple Finance clarifies NCD partial redemption & interest payment
item.description:
Purple Finance Ltd clarified its April 8, 2026 intimation regarding the record date of April 27, 2026, for Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) under ISIN INE0CYK07012. The company confirmed it is a partial redemption, not an early full redemption, aligning with the offer document, and the final maturity remains January 12, 2028. The partial redemption is executed by reducing the face value per NCD from ₹10,000 to ₹8,333.34, with ₹1,666.67 being redeemed. The total number of NCDs remains unchanged. Interest payment along with partial redemption proceeds will be made on May 12, 2026, to eligible debenture holders as per the record date.

  • Partial redemption of NCDs (ISIN INE0CYK07012) confirmed.
  • Face value reduced from ₹10,000 to ₹8,333.34 per NCD.
  • ₹1,666.67 per NCD redeemed; total NCDs unchanged.
  • Interest and redemption payment due May 12, 2026.
  • Final NCD maturity remains January 12, 2028.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Purple Finance Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [INFLAME] Inflame Appliances: Amit Kaushik appointed Addl. Director; Ashwani Goel resigns
item.description:
Inflame Appliances Ltd announced significant management changes. Mr. Ashwani Kumar Goel resigned from the position of Whole-time Director, effective April 15, 2026, citing personal reasons. Concurrently, the Board of Directors, based on the Nomination and Remuneration Committee's recommendation, approved the appointment of Mr. Amit Kaushik as an Additional Director, also effective April 15, 2026. This appointment is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming General Meeting. Mr. Kaushik, who currently serves as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO), will continue in that role while also holding the Additional Director position. He brings over 29 years of experience in business promotion and strategic leadership and is related to the Chairman and Managing Director, Mr. Aditya Kaushik, and Whole-time Director, Anusheel Kaushik.

  • Ashwani Kumar Goel resigned as Whole-time Director effective April 15, 2026.
  • Amit Kaushik appointed as Additional Director, effective April 15, 2026.
  • Mr. Kaushik will serve as CEO and Additional Director, pending shareholder approval.
  • He has over 29 years of experience in business promotion and strategic leadership.
  • Amit Kaushik is related to the Chairman & MD and another Whole-time Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Inflame Appliances Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SUPREMEIND] Supreme Industries Board to meet Apr 27 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Supreme Industries Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 27, 2026. The primary agenda for the meeting includes the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and potentially recommend a dividend on equity shares. The trading window for the company's equity shares, which was previously closed, will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results on April 27, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To consider and approve FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • To consider dividend recommendation for equity shares.
  • Trading window to open 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
